ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number (e.g., BMR001) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the card (e.g., Draculord) */,
  "subtitle" TEXT /* Subtitle of the card (e.g., Hypnotic Vampire) */,
  "xp_dam_hp_phase" TEXT /* XP/Dam/HP/Phase value of the card */,
  "treasure" TEXT /* Type of treasure associated with the card */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of card (e.g., Boss, Monster, Spell, Room) */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Effect or description of the card */,
  "minimum_players" TEXT /* Minimum number of players required for the card to be used */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card available */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost to play the card */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card (e.g., common, uncommon, rare, legendary) */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the card set to which the card belongs */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the card image */,
  "flavor_text" TEXT /* Additional flavor text for the card */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the card details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or profile description */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's current status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "xp" INTEGER /* User's experience points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_cards" (
  "user_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-card relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card owned by the user */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the card was used */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date and time the card was acquired */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method by which the card was acquired (e.g., pack, trade, reward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game session (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who won the game session */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Type of game mode (e.g., single player, multiplayer, ranked) */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., casual, tournament) */,
  "total_turns" INTEGER /* Total number of turns in the session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "session_settings" TEXT /* JSON column to store session settings (e.g., time limits, rules) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_players" (
  "session_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-player relationship */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user in the game session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user in the game session (e.g., active, eliminated) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the player in the session (e.g., 1st, 2nd) */,
  "final_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the player in the session */,
  "victory_points" INTEGER /* Number of victory points earned by the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player at the end of the session */,
  "cards_used" TEXT /* JSON array of card IDs used by the player in the session */,
  "cards_drawn" TEXT /* JSON array of card IDs drawn by the player in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_players_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_players_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_cards" (
  "session_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-card relationship */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player using the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card used in the session */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the card was played */,
  "play_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the card was played */,
  "play_effect" TEXT /* Detailed effect of the card when played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_cards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_cards_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turns" (
  "turn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turn */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player taking the turn */,
  "turn_number" INTEGER /* Turn number in the game session */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions taken by the player during the turn */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken for the turn */,
  "cards_drawn" TEXT /* JSON array of card IDs drawn during the turn */,
  "cards_played" TEXT /* JSON array of card IDs played during the turn */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* JSON array of actions taken during the turn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turns_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turns_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id_sender" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the card */,
  "user_id_recipient" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the card */,
  "card_id_sent" INTEGER /* ID of the card sent */,
  "card_id_received" INTEGER /* ID of the card received */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., direct, auction) */,
  "trade_terms" TEXT /* JSON column to store the terms of the trade */,
  "trade_message" TEXT /* Message sent with the trade request */,
  "trade_status_message" TEXT /* Detailed status message of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_card_id_sent FOREIGN KEY ("card_id_sent") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_card_id_received FOREIGN KEY ("card_id_received") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id_sender FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_sender") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id_recipient FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_recipient") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card effect */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., Level Up, Attack, Draw) */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the effect */,
  "trigger_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the effect */,
  "effect_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the effect (e.g., permanent, one turn) */,
  "affected_cards" TEXT /* JSON array of card IDs affected by the effect */,
  "affected_players" TEXT /* JSON array of player IDs affected by the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_effects_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the card type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card type */,
  "card_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the card type image */,
  "card_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the card type icon */,
  "card_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the card type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treasure_types" (
  "treasure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treasure type */,
  "treasure_name" TEXT /* Name of the treasure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treasure type */,
  "treasure_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the treasure type image */,
  "treasure_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the treasure type icon */,
  "treasure_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the treasure type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treasure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dungeons" (
  "dungeon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dungeon */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who built the dungeon */,
  "dungeon_name" TEXT /* Name of the dungeon */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the dungeon */,
  "total_monsters" INTEGER /* Total number of monsters in the dungeon */,
  "total_spells" INTEGER /* Total number of spells in the dungeon */,
  "total_treasure" INTEGER /* Total number of treasure in the dungeon */,
  "dungeon_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the dungeon image */,
  "dungeon_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the dungeon */,
  "dungeon_theme" TEXT /* Theme of the dungeon (e.g., forest, desert, castle) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dungeon */,
  "total_victory_points" INTEGER /* Total victory points earned from the dungeon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dungeon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dungeon_rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "dungeon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dungeon */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room card */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the room in the dungeon */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the room (e.g., active, destroyed) */,
  "room_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the room image */,
  "room_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the room */,
  "room_theme" TEXT /* Theme of the room (e.g., library, laboratory, throne room) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeon_rooms_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeon_rooms_dungeon_id FOREIGN KEY ("dungeon_id") REFERENCES dungeons ("dungeon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dungeon_monsters" (
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monster */,
  "dungeon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dungeon */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monster card */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the monster (e.g., active, defeated) */,
  "monster_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the monster image */,
  "monster_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the monster */,
  "monster_theme" TEXT /* Theme of the monster (e.g., undead, elemental, beast) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the monster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeon_monsters_dungeon_id FOREIGN KEY ("dungeon_id") REFERENCES dungeons ("dungeon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeon_monsters_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeon_monsters_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES dungeon_rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dungeon_spells" (
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spell */,
  "dungeon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dungeon */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell card */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the spell (e.g., active, used) */,
  "spell_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the spell image */,
  "spell_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the spell */,
  "spell_theme" TEXT /* Theme of the spell (e.g., fire, ice, lightning) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the spell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeon_spells_dungeon_id FOREIGN KEY ("dungeon_id") REFERENCES dungeons ("dungeon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dungeon_spells_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., play card, draw card, attack) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., server, client) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)
